item.title: Opendoor Pops After Earnings, But the Big Question Hasn’t Changed
item.description: Opendoor stock surged after Q4 earnings, but profitability questions and housing market headwinds may leave investors weighing speculation vs. sustain...

item.title: Gold and Silver Pulled Back—Here’s Why the Bull Case Is Intact
item.description: Gold and silver prices remain in a long-term uptrend. These three mining stocks offer leveraged exposure to rising metals demand and improving fundame...

item.title: DoorDash Rebound Signal: Analysts See Double-Digit Upside From Here
item.description: DoorDash is setting up to accelerate growth as it leans into technology and new markets. Analysts trimmed targets but see deep value in this stock.

item.title: Zillow’s 3-Day Rally Could Mean More Than You Think
item.description: After a 50% drop and extreme oversold readings, Zillow’s sudden run of green sessions may signal that a bottom is starting to form.

item.title: Hims & Hers in Free Fall: Why Analysts See Nearly 150% Upside
item.description: HIMS is down 48% in the past month following a Novo Nordisk lawsuit. But, analysts expect record revenue when the company reports earnings this month.
